query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A man and woman stand together indoors in front of a white paneled door and a yellow-textured wall, participating in a toast with martini glasses and a shot glass. The man wears a black long-sleeve shirt with a red graphic print reading "DEATH BEFORE DISHONOR" and holds a shot glass in one hand and a martini glass in the other. The woman in the foreground wears a black top and a silver choker necklace. A third person's arm extends from the left edge of the frame holding a martini glass. In the lower left corner, a bottle with a green cap and other objects rest on a surface, while a metallic balloon decoration hangs in the upper left.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A man and woman stand together indoors in front of a white paneled door and a yellow-textured wall, illuminated by harsh direct on-camera flash that creates bright specular highlights on their skin and glassware and casts hard shadows behind them. They participate in a toast with martini glasses and a shot glass. The man wears a black long-sleeve shirt with a red graphic print reading "DEATH BEFORE DISHONOR" and holds a shot glass in one hand and a martini glass in the other. The woman in the foreground wears a black top and a silver choker necklace. A third person's arm extends from the left edge of the frame holding a martini glass. In the lower left corner, a bottle with a green cap and other objects rest on a surface, while a metallic balloon decoration hangs in the upper left.
